title: bidens menziesii
intro: Bidens menziesii, also known as Menzies' beggarticks, is a species of flowering plant in the aster family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu, as well as having antiviral and antibacterial properties. In herbal preparations, Bidens menziesii is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions.
